prompt: Create a vertical poster-style AI artwork on a clean white background featuring a highly detailed Shigaraki ware tanuki ceramic statue centered full-body, photographed/illustrated like a glossy speckled pottery object with beige belly, dark brown limbs, mottled glaze, rounded belly, small navel, large straw hat, sake bottle in one paw, and a tokkuri flask or ledger-like accessory in the other. The tanuki’s face is deliberately obscured by a perfectly centered opaque square censor block in warm taupe brown, covering the upper torso and face area while leaving the hat rim visible behind it. Surround the statue with energetic abstract graphic-design elements: concentric halftone circles, black-and-white diagonal stripes, dotted gradients, thin radial sunburst lines behind the hat, hot pink and orange blocks, yellow arcs, black rings, magenta splatter, small crosses, grid textures, and subtle glitch-like cyan/magenta color offsets around the statue edges. Use a high-contrast mixed-media style combining realistic ceramic texture with modern pop-art poster graphics, crisp studio lighting, sharp details, and a balanced symmetrical composition. Add a small handwritten signature and date in the bottom right reading May 14, 2026 and Ogygia. Keep the background mostly white, no extra characters, no readable text beyond the date/signature and the bottle markings, and emphasize the unique quality of a Shigaraki ware tanuki statue.
